data.description:
Title: Machine Learning Engineer (DSC|SN)
  
  
Job ID: 20426
  
  
Location:
  
  
ST Engineering Jurong East Bui, SG
  
  
**Description**
ST Engineering is a global technology, defence and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East and the U.S., serving customers in more than 100 countries. The Group uses technology and innovation to solve real-world problems and improve lives through its diverse portfolio of businesses across the aerospace, smart city, defence and public security segments. Headquartered in Singapore, ST Engineering ranks among the largest companies listed on the Singapore Exchange.
  
  
**Join our Cyber Team**
We are an industry leader in cybersecurity with over two decades of experience, we deliver a holistic suite of trusted cybersecurity solutions to empower cyber resilience for government and ministries, critical infrastructure, and commercial enterprises. Backed by our indigenous capabilities and deep domain expertise, we offer robust cyber-secure products and services in cryptography, cybersecurity engineering, digital authentication, SCADA protection, audit and compliance. We specialise in the design and build of security operations centres for cybersecurity professionals and provide managed security services to strengthen the cybersecurity posture of our government and enterprise customers.
  
  
The incumbent will design, build, and deploy agentic AI models, ensuring robust performance across digital twin simulations and real-world production systems.
  
  
This role calls for a hands-on Machine Learning Engineer with a deep understanding of both intelligent agent behavior and ML infrastructure, capable of bridging experimental models with production-grade AI solutions.
  
  
The incumbent will be a technically excellent and research-savvy AI Data Scientist who can push the boundaries of intelligent behavior—turning complex data and models into real-world, decision-capable AI systems.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

- Design and implement agentic AI models capable of autonomous decision-making, planning, and tool use in complex environments.
- Develop and train machine learning models tailored for both simulation-based (digital twin) testing and live production deployment.
- Translate high-level behavioral specifications into scalable, modular ML architectures that enable adaptive and interactive agents.
- Collaborate with data scientists, AI architects, and systems engineers to integrate models into broader AI pipelines and system architectures.
- Optimize models for efficiency, robustness, and real-time performance within distributed and resource-constrained environments.
- Implement continuous training, fine-tuning, and model evaluation workflows to support evolving agent behavior and dynamic environments.
- Ensure alignment of model outputs with system goals, safety constraints, and operational performance metrics.
- Contribute to MLOps pipelines, including model versioning, deployment automation, monitoring, and rollback mechanisms.

**Requirements**
**Experience**

- 5+ years of experience in machine learning engineering or applied AI, including model deployment in production environments.
- Demonstrated success in developing and deploying ML models within simulation and real-time operational contexts.

**Technical Skills**

- Proficiency in ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and tools for agentic and reinforcement learning (e.g., Ray RLlib, Stable-Baselines).
- Strong experience with model training, evaluation, and deployment across both digital twins and live systems.
- Familiarity with MLOps, CI/CD pipelines for ML, and monitoring tools for model performance and drift detection.
- Understanding of agent-based modeling, planning algorithms, and state/action representations.
- Experience with containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) for ML workloads.

**Preferred Knowledge**

- Exposure to agentic AI systems, multi-agent coordination, or intelligent automation frameworks.
- Familiarity with digital twin architectures, synthetic data generation, and simulation-to-reality transfer techniques.
- Experience integrating models into service-oriented or microservice architectures.

Work Location: Jurong East
  
  
Find out more: https://www.stengg.com/cybersecurity
  
  
ST Engineering believes in fostering a culture where team members are encouraged to overcome challenges, explore new ideas, and work together to succeed. We value individuals who are determined to push beyond the boundaries, and have a thirst for knowledge, continuous learning, and self-improvement

data.job_title: Senior/System Engineer -  Entry level candidates welcome (DSC/EZ)
data.description:
**About ST Engineering**

**ST Engineering**
is a global technology, defence, and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and the U.S., serving customers in more than 100 countries. The Group uses technology and innovation to solve real-world problems and improve lives through its diverse portfolio of businesses across the aerospace, smart city, defence, and public security segments. Headquartered in Singapore, ST Engineering ranks among the largest companies listed on the Singapore Exchange.

Our history spans more than 50 years, and our strategy is underpinned by our core values – Integrity, Value Creation, Courage, Commitment and Compassion. These 5 core values guide every aspect of our business and are embedded in our ST Engineering culture – from the people we hire, to working with each other, to our partners and customers.

**About our Line of Business – Mission Software & Services**

Our
**Mission Software & Services**
business provides leading-edge mission critical command, control, and communications (C3) systems with secured IT infrastructure and managed services. We support our client’s innovation journey through design thinking, analytics, and AI-enabled decision support with our full suite of cloud computing solutions. We provide intelligent, actionable insights and sustainable solutions to our valued partners in diverse industries including defence, government, and commercial sectors.

**Together, We Can Make A Significant Impact**

Join the frontline of our operations support and maintenance team, driving excellence in mission-critical Defence projects. Embrace the opportunity to play a critical role in proactively analyze and troubleshoot issues, ensuring seamless operations that exceed SLA expectations. Stand ready for action when duty calls. Your passion and dedication ensures operational excellence and project success.

**Be Part of Our Success**

- Plan, execute, monitor and assist in the installation and ongoing support and maintenance of all hardware, software and networks in project delivery
- Conduct root cause analysis & implement pro-active measures
- Responsible for supporting operational systems satisfying contractual Service Level Agreement
- Perform and manage routine preventive maintenance and operational activities promptly and effectively; Perform troubleshooting and fault rectification
- Provide up-to-date project documentation and reports
- Diagnose and rectify technical issues
- Perform standby duties if required

**Qualities We Value**

- Experience in Windows server OS, Unix/Linux OS & virtualization environment (VMware, HyperV etc.)
- Strong troubleshooting skills and analytical mind with problem-solving aptitude
- Excellent written and verbal communication to convey technical ideas to both technical and non-technical audiences and contribute within a team environment
- Pro-active, dynamic and with good analytical/conceptual thinking
- Able to work independently as well as in a team and good interpersonal skills
- Good Working knowledge with VPN, firewall appliances would be an advantage
- Good working knowledge with routers, switches would be an advantage
- Good working knowledge in hardware like servers, storage area networks (SAN), network- attached storage (NAS) devices
- Experience in hardening of OS, system and network equipment
- Experience in Patch Management
- Good Knowledge of IT Infra services like Active Directory, DHCP, DNS, Exchange/Mail
- Service, Database, Web or App Server etc.
- Experience in SQL, Java, C++, JavaScript would be an advantage
- Entry level candidates are welcome. Candidates with more/ complexity of experience will be considered for a senior role.

**Our Commitment That Goes Beyond the Norm**

- An environment where you will be working on cutting-edge technologies and architectures.
- Safe space where diverse perspectives are valued, and everyone’s unique contributions are celebrated.
- Meaningful work and projects that make a difference in people’s lives.
- A fun, passionate and collaborative workplace.
- Competitive remuneration and comprehensive benefits.

data.job_title: AVP, Business Excellence and Sustainability, Corporate Development (DSC/HL)
data.location: Ang Mo Kio, North East Community Development Council
data.short_location: Ang Mo Kio, North East Community Development Council
data.long_location: Ang Mo Kio, North East Community Development Council
data.description:
**Job Description**

- Provide operational support to Defence & Public Security (DPS) Head Corporate Development for the oversight activities for all DPS Corporate Functions and driving DPS BAs Operation Excellence Workplan to achieve planned target for the year.
- Lead and provide guidance to DPS BAs to ensure alignment of overall DPS approach and processes in practice by DPS BAs toward Group Operation Excellence and Sustainability policies, direction, and goals.
- Organize and conduct DPS Sustainability Focus Team bi-monthly progress review with all DPS BAs to achieve KPI targets.
- Provide leadership in driving the deployment of the Group Sustainability Initiatives across DPS BAs and sharing of best practices among BAs. Continue to support the Group Sustainability Yearly Key Focus Areas.
- Lead DPS BAs to define, simplify, and deploy DPS BAs Environmental dashboard utilizing the Sustainability Reporting Platform (SRP) for GHG Emission Reduction, Water Usage Reduction and Waste Recycling tracker.
- Drive DPS BAs Sustainability Records Tracker for data and initiatives to achieve timely and accurate Sustainability Reporting.
- Lead DPS BAs in defining, setting, monitoring and timely reporting of DPS Operational Excellence Performing Indicator and Performance Incentive and drive improvement actions to ensure all Performance Incentives meeting set target.
- Actively monitor and drive improvement actions to meet DPS/ BAs Performance Incentives (PI) performance
- Lead and coaching of respective DPS/ BAs OESC Specialist Team's (OEST) to harmonize processes across BAs for continuous improvement:
  **OEST (Quality), OEST (Environment), OEST (Continuous Improvement)**
- Support the organizing and conducting the half-yearly (or as required) progress review with the DPS Corporate Functions to prioritize workplan and initiatives in DPS.
- Lead, influence, coordinate, and drive DPS BAs on assigned DPS Corporate Development Business Excellence and Cost Reduction initiatives to meet the set target.

**Qualification & Experiences**

- Tertiary degree in General Science / Engineering or related discipline.
- A minimum of 5 years' working experience
- Knowledge of Sustainable Business Practises, Sustainability Supply Chain Management
- Good knowledge of how to help company streamline operations, improve efficiency, and foster culture of ongoing developments.
- Preferred certifications in tailored and practical certifications e.g. ISO, Six Sigma, Lean, Kaizen, Continuous Improvement and Global Reporting Initiative Standards.
- Excellent management and leadership skills.
- Good Team Player

data.description:
ST Engineering is a global technology, defence and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East and the U.S., serving customers in more than 100 countries. The Group uses technology and innovation to solve real-world problems and improve lives. Our dedication to excellence and our strong track record have earned us a distinctive reputation for quality and trust as an integrated engineering group, spanning across the aerospace, smart city, defence and public security segments. Headquartered in Singapore, ST Engineering ranks among the largest companies listed on the Singapore Exchange.

**Join our Cyber Team**

We are an industry leader in cybersecurity with over two decades of experience, we deliver a holistic suite of trusted cybersecurity solutions to empower cyber resilience for government and ministries, critical infrastructure, and commercial enterprises. Backed by our indigenous capabilities and deep domain expertise, we offer robust cyber-secure products and services in cryptography, cybersecurity engineering, digital authentication, SCADA protection, audit and compliance. We specialise in the design and build of security operations centres for cybersecurity professionals and provide managed security services to strengthen the cybersecurity posture of our government and enterprise customers.

**Job Description:**

- Lead and assist in operational and support activities including case management, troubleshooting and onsite engineering support.
- Plan, coordinate and perform testing activities such as regression, load, performance, integration, and acceptance testing.
- Plan and assist in configuring, maintaining and troubleshooting servers and workstations in production and test environments.
- Lead and assist in maintaining software documentation. The documentation includes test plan, test procedures, test report, maintenance manual, and user manual.
- Lead and assist in deployment of custom software.
- Manage and implement software change requests.
- Provide administration and support services for custom systems and software releases. Example system administration tasks include file access control, user administration and change management on production and test environments.

**Job Requirements:**

- At least 6 years’ experience in development of production software in C/C++.
- Knowledge in Object Oriented Programming, Secure Coding, .NET programming, Python/PowerShell scripting and/or UI programming is preferred.
- Familiar with source code version control tools such as GIT.
- Strong interest in software development and engineering.
- Possess initiative and willingness to learn.
- Good written and oral communication skills.
- Ability to lead a small team

Find out more:  https://www.stengg.com/cybersecurity

ST Engineering believes in fostering a culture where team members are encouraged to overcome challenges, explore new ideas, and work together to succeed. We value individuals who are determined to push beyond the boundaries, and have a thirst for knowledge, continuous learning, and self-improvement.

data.description:
Company description:  
  

ST Engineering's Marine business provides integrated shipbuilding, ship repair and ship conversion services. With a proven track record spanning over five decades, we have designed and built vessels for commercial and defence customers worldwide. Expanding on our core competencies, ST Engineering's Marine business also provides maintenance, repair and conversion services.   
  
We are committed to embracing digitalisation to being the shipyard of the future, harnessing innovative smart manufacturing technologies to improve our efficiencies. Leveraging our established expertise, ST Engineering's Marine business is committed to remain a trusted solution partner for our customers.

  
  
Job description:  
  

**Overall Purpose of Job:**

Able to assess engineering problems and develops pragmatic solutions to resolve engineering related issues for shipboard Automation projects, and to ensure the designs are in accordance to contractual specifications and marine classification requirement.

**Responsibilities:**

- Responsible for all automation related design, platform system integration and interface with the Ship Management System (SMS) and platform system related control and monitoring and logics, which includes basic and detail design :

- - SMS architecture
  - SMS functional description
  - I/O list
  - Integration of third party equipment / system with SMS
  - Conduct integration reviews with vendors and client
  - Control console design and control panel arrangement
  - Control room arrangement layout
  - Platform system automation design, system control and monitoring

- Responsible for ship safety and surveillance related systems, which includes:
  - Propulsion control system
  - Dynamic positioning system
  - CCTV system
  - Fire Detection System
  - Harbour Duty Surveillance System
- Review vendors technical proposal to ensure it meets the requirement
- Responsible for ensuring the Contractual technical requirement and Classification requirement of automation related design are fulfilled and within project schedule
- Liaise with client, internal engineering trades and vendors for project coordination
- Technical review and meetings with client and vendors during project execution to ensure requirement are fulfilled, provide solutions and resolve technical issues.

**Other features of job (Shift or night work, travel, working conditions)**

- Attend to local or oversea travels/deployment for project work (where required)
- Attend Sea Trials for a specified period (Where required)

**Knowledge & Skills:**

- Knowledge of Marine Electronics and Automation systems
- Knowledge in computer networking, control instrumentation and control system design
- Knowledge of standard communication protocols like Modbus RTU/TCP, Prrofibus, RS422, RS485, NEMA, CANbus, J1939
- Knowledge in Autocad, Naviswork, AVEVA model software
- Good Interpersonal Skills, problem solving skills and is a team player
- Good time management and able to meet tight deadlines

**Education, Qualifications and Special Training**

- Degree in Electrical, Automation, Mechanical Engineering

**Personality Traits**

- A team player who is also an independent thinker and doer, with effective interpersonal skills, organised and able to multi-task
- Deadline driven, able to work within tight timeline/schedule
- Strong verbal, written and presentation skills are important

**Other Information:**

- Location: Benoi Road (Island-wide transport provided)
- 5 days work week
- Working Hours: 7.25am-5pm

data.description:
**Job Description**

We are seeking an experienced **Assistant Project Manager** to lead and manage **large-scale ELV (Extra Low Voltage) and BMS (Building Management System) greenfield projects**, particularly within **complex environments such as hospitals or airports**.

The ideal candidate will have strong project management capabilities, excellent stakeholder management skills, and hands-on experience in planning, cost control, and project execution.

**Responsibilities**

•  Lead the end-to-end delivery of ELV and BMS greenfield projects, ensuring successful execution from planning through to completion.

•  Develop and maintain detailed project schedules using Microsoft Project, ensuring alignment with overall project milestones.

•  Monitor and control project progress, ensuring deliverables meet timeline, quality, and scope requirements.

•  Manage project financials, including:

·       Project cash flow tracking

·       Cost control and budgeting

·       Estimation at Completion (EAC)

•  Prepare and present monthly project reports, including updates on:

·       Project schedule status

·       Cost performance and budget tracking

·       Key risks and mitigation actions

•  Coordinate with clients, consultants, contractors, and internal teams to ensure smooth project execution.

•  Manage and respond to client and stakeholder expectations, ensuring clear communication and issue resolution.

•  Identify and mitigate project risks, including technical, operational, and financial risks.

•  Oversee site execution activities, working closely with engineering teams to ensure proper implementation.

•  Ensure compliance with contract requirements, safety standards, and project specifications.

**Requirements**

•  Diploma or Degree in Engineering, Building Services, Electrical, Mechanical, or related discipline.

•  Minimum 5 years of project management experience, preferably in:

·       ELV systems (e.g. CCTV, access control, structured cabling, security systems)

·       BMS (Building Management Systems)

·       Large-scale infrastructure projects

•  Proven experience in greenfield projects within hospitals, airports, or similar complex environments.

•  Strong proficiency in Microsoft Project for scheduling and planning.

•  Strong understanding of project lifecycle, contract management, and site coordination.

•  Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to engage both external clients and internal teams.

•  Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-stakes project environment.

**Preferred Skills**

- Experience working with system integrators or main contractors
- Familiarity with hospital or airport regulatory and operational environments
- PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project management certification
- Knowledge of digitisation, smart building systems, or IoT integration

data.company: ST Engineering Aerospace Engines Pte Ltd
data.description:
**About the role**  
  
ST Engineering Aerospace Engines Pte Ltd is seeking a skilled and dedicated **Technician, Facilities & Maintenance** to join our team on a **full-time basis**. Based in the **Airport Road East Region**, this role is crucial to ensuring our facilities operate safely, efficiently, and to the highest standards. As a Technician, Facilities & Maintenance, you will be responsible for the upkeep, repair, and maintenance of our industrial facilities, equipment, and infrastructure. This position plays a vital role in supporting our aerospace engines operations and ensuring continuity of our business activities.

**Key responsibilities:**

- Perform routine and preventative maintenance on facilities, equipment, machinery, and building systems
- Identify, diagnose, and repair mechanical, electrical, and structural issues promptly and efficiently
- Conduct regular inspections of facilities to ensure compliance with health and safety standards
- Maintain accurate records of maintenance activities, repairs, and equipment servicing
- Respond to maintenance requests and emergency repairs in a timely manner
- Coordinate with other teams and contractors to ensure maintenance projects are completed on schedule
- Monitor and manage inventory of maintenance supplies and equipment
- Support the implementation of preventative maintenance programmes to minimise downtime
- Ensure all work is completed in accordance with relevant regulations, policies, and safety protocols

**What we're looking for**

- NITEC, Higher NITEC, Diploma, or equivalent in Engineering, Mechanical, Electrical, Maintenance, or related fields
- Proven experience as a facilities technician, maintenance technician, or in a related handyperson role within an industrial or commercial environment
- Strong knowledge of maintenance procedures, tools, and equipment commonly used in facilities management
- Proficiency in diagnosing and repairing mechanical and electrical systems
- Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, blueprints, and maintenance manuals
- Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently and as part of a team
- Strong attention to detail and commitment to safety and quality standards
- Physical capability to perform manual labour and work at heights if required
- Experience in aerospace, manufacturing, or industrial environments would be highly valued

**About us**  
  
ST Engineering Aerospace Engines Pte Ltd is a leading aerospace engineering company specialising in the maintenance, repair, and overhaul of aerospace engines. We are committed to delivering excellence, innovation, and reliability in all our operations. Our team is composed of highly skilled professionals dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of safety, quality, and customer satisfaction. We pride ourselves on fostering a collaborative culture where employees are valued, supported, and encouraged to develop their skills and advance their careers.

**What we offer**  
  
At ST Engineering Aerospace Engines Pte Ltd, we are committed to supporting our employees' wellbeing and professional development. We offer competitive remuneration, comprehensive benefits packages, and opportunities for continuous learning and career advancement. Our workplace prioritises safety, respect, and inclusion, creating an environment where our team members can thrive. We encourage a healthy work-life balance and provide support to help you succeed in your role.

If you believe you are a strong match for this exciting opportunity, we encourage you to **apply now**. Please submit your resume and a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and qualifications.

company_object.name: ST Engineering Aerospace Engines Pte Ltd
company_object.long_description:
Backed by 40 years of experience and track record in the global aviation industry, we provide integrated nose-to-tail services and solutions through a global network of facilities and affiliates in the U.S., Asia Pacific and Europe.
With proven solutions for practically every stage of an aircraft life cycle, our solutions range from design and engineering, original equipment manufacturing, aftermarket and maintenance services, assets management and leasing, to giving ageing aircraft a new lease of life through passenger-to-freighter conversion or refurbishment. We are the only freighter conversion house using original OEM engineering data on both Boeing and Airbus platforms.

data.company: ST Engineering Unmanned & Integrated Systems Pte Ltd
data.description:
**About ST Engineering**

**ST Engineering** is a global technology, defence, and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and the U.S., serving customers in more than 100 countries. The Group uses technology and innovation to solve real-world problems and improve lives through its diverse portfolio of businesses across the aerospace, smart city, defence, and public security segments. Headquartered in Singapore, ST Engineering ranks among the largest companies listed on the Singapore Exchange.

Our history spans more than 50 years, and our strategy is underpinned by our core values – Integrity, Value Creation, Courage, Commitment and Compassion. These 5 core values guide every aspect of our business and are embedded in our ST Engineering culture – from the people we hire, to working with each other, to our partners and customers.

**About our Business**

Our **Unmanned & Integrated Systems** business offers holistic solutions in system engineering and integration. We pioneer maritime robotics and autonomy solutions, provide system integration for complex naval and island air defence System-of-Systems (SoS), and take care of the operation and maintenance of Command, Control, Communications, Computers Intelligence (C4I) systems. We cater to the needs of Defence, Public Safety & Security, and Commercial clients worldwide, providing seamless and innovative services that redefine possibilities.

**Together, We Can Make A Significant Impact**

To be part of a Division / Centre on solving engineering matters as well as general engineering works which include and not limited to involvement in the design and develop of mechanical systems and/or sub systems to the required specifications for use across (mainly) military applications e.g. Electro-Mechanical systems, Platforms and Ground Control Systems, R&D of UAV or sub system of UAV.

**Be Part of Our Success**

- Project Management such as technical planning, engineering coordination, schedule tracking and vendor management
- Understanding/reading design specifications and technical drawings
- Design and generating CAD Model using Autodesk and/or SolidWorks
- Generate Finite Element Analysis (FEA) against designed articles and ability to interpret analyzed data
- Problem solving, troubleshooting of System and/or Sub System equipment fault, proposing modifications of System and/or Sub System
- Design and prototyping of test fixtures, test jigs, mock-ups and prototype assemblies
- Product development from concept development, detailed design, prototype fabrication and future improvement
- Preparing of System and Technical related documentation such as Design Reports, Engineering Calculations, Test Plan/Procedure/Reports, Technical & User Manuals and Technical presentations

**Qualities We Value**

- Knowledge in Mechanical Engineering or related
- Have knowledge of mechanical design principles, engineering drawing standards, material selection and manufacturing processes
- Proficient in using CAD Software like Autodesk and/or SolidWorks
- Problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Proficient with MS Office, Visio
- Team Player who will be working closely with multidisciplinary team (Systems, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics and O&S)
- Hands-on and practical
- Self-Motivated and eager to learn
- Comfortable working in a startup or growing engineering environment
- Able to work independently with minimal supervision
- Capable of supporting both project delivery and R&D activities
- Willing to participate in field testing and system trials
- Singaporean only

**Our Commitment That Goes Beyond the Norm**

- An environment where you will be working on cutting-edge technologies and architectures.
- Safe space where diverse perspectives are valued, and everyone’s unique contributions are celebrated.
- Meaningful work and projects that make a difference in people’s lives.
- A fun, passionate and collaborative workplace.
- Competitive remuneration and comprehensive benefits.

Location: Ang Mo Kio

data.description:
**About ST Engineering**

**ST Engineering**
is a global technology, defence, and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and the U.S., serving customers in more than 100 countries. The Group uses technology and innovation to solve real-world problems and improve lives through its diverse portfolio of businesses across the aerospace, smart city, defence, and public security segments. Headquartered in Singapore, ST Engineering ranks among the largest companies listed on the Singapore Exchange.

Our history spans more than 50 years, and our strategy is underpinned by our core values – Integrity, Value Creation, Courage, Commitment and Compassion. These 5 core values guide every aspect of our business and are embedded in our ST Engineering culture – from the people we hire, to working with each other, to our partners and customers.

**About our Line of Business – Mission Software & Services**

Our
**Mission Software & Services**
business provides leading-edge mission critical command, control, and communications (C3) systems with secured IT infrastructure and managed services. We support our client’s innovation journey through design thinking, analytics, and AI-enabled decision support with our full suite of cloud computing solutions. We provide intelligent, actionable insights and sustainable solutions to our valued partners in diverse industries including defence, government, and commercial sectors.

**Together, We Can Make A Significant Impact**

Foster robust collaboration with project stakeholders to gain profound insights into user needs in the Defence and Public Security ecosystem. Craft captivating, user-centric designs across web, mobile, and print platforms, exhibiting finesse and precision. Conduct comprehensive user research and deliver strategic recommendations, ensuring designs are intuitive and resonate with users

**Be Part of Our Success**

- Work with the project manager, client and development team to understand user needs, business objectives and design requirements.
- Develop user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs that effectively communicate design concepts and solutions, and review designs with the team and stakeholders. (Website, mobile app and posters)
- Presentation of design solutions to internal teams, key stakeholders and management.
- Identify knowledge gaps in our understanding of user motivations and pain points.
- Propose research initiatives and conduct user research, including usability testing, surveys, and interviews, to gather insights and translate research findings into strategic design recommendations.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product owners to ensure design solutions are feasible and aligned with user needs and business objectives.
- Ensure that design solutions are visually appealing, intuitive, and consistent with the design system and brand guidelines.
- Work with frontend developers to ensure that designs are implemented accurately and to the highest standards.
- Participate in front end development. Training provided.

**Qualities We Value**

- A portfolio showcasing visual design skills, user-centered design thinking, research capabilities and strong analytical skills.
- Experience with design tools such as Figma, or similar tools.
- Experience in requirement gathering through workshops, interviews and research.
- Knowledge of user research methodologies and ability to conduct user testing and research.
- Ability to convey ideas through variety of methods: storytelling, storyboards, mood boards, flow charts and power point slides etc.
- Strong communication (verbal, written/visual) and collaboration skills.
- Attention to detail down to the pixel and ensure design solutions are consistent with the design system.
- Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
- Good business acumen and be able to understand and contribute to business goals and objective.
- An understanding of Agile and Scrum is a plus.
- Experience in project management is a plus.
- Experience in front end development is a plus.

**Our Commitment That Goes Beyond the Norm**

- An environment where you will be working on cutting-edge technologies and architectures.
- Safe space where diverse perspectives are valued, and everyone’s unique contributions are celebrated.
- Meaningful work and projects that make a difference in people’s lives.
- A fun, passionate and collaborative workplace.
- Competitive remuneration and comprehensive benefits.

data.company: ST Engineering Aerospace Services Company Pte. Ltd.
data.description:
**Key Responsibilities:**

·       Monitor demand and issuance of inventory items with precision to ensure materials are available for production without delays.

·       Process and manage all production demands efficiently, coordinating closely with the production team to meet their requirements.

·       Monitoring accurate record of inventory and stock management system.

·       Conversion of stock from SBUs. Including raising CV, arranging for transportation and managing transport adhoc form.

·       Handle the processing and monitoring of parts returned from production, ensuring proper recording and timely updates in the system.

·       Prepare and execute stocktake plan include processing physical inventory documents and preparing stocktake report.

·       Prepare inventory status, issuance, returns, MOQ, stocktake and shelf-life reports and other ad hoc requests.

·       Update Materials Requirement Planning (MRP) settings as requested by the Material Planning team.

**Requirements and Skills:**

·       Completion of "O" Level/ Nitec or equivalent qualification is preferred.

·       Proficient user of Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel and Word, to manage data and reporting tasks efficiently.

·       Familiarity with SAP system is preferred.

·       Possess good interpersonal skill and a positive attitude to handle challenging customers and resolve tense situations.

·       Strong interpersonal skills coupled with a positive, solution-oriented mindset, capable of handling challenging customer interactions professionally and resolving tense situations calmly.

·       Ability to work effectively under pressure with a strong sense of urgency, maintaining accuracy and quality in a fast-paced environment.

· Willingness and flexibility to support operational requirements, open to work on weekends.

company_object.name: ST Engineering Aerospace Services Company Pte. Ltd.
company_object.long_description:
Backed by 40 years of experience and track record in the global aviation industry, we provide integrated nose-to-tail services and solutions through a global network of facilities and affiliates in the U.S., Asia Pacific and Europe.
With proven solutions for practically every stage of an aircraft life cycle, our solutions range from design and engineering, original equipment manufacturing, aftermarket and maintenance services, assets management and leasing, to giving ageing aircraft a new lease of life through passenger-to-freighter conversion or refurbishment. We are the only freighter conversion house using original OEM engineering data on both Boeing and Airbus platforms.

data.description:
Title: Machine Learning Engineer (DSC|SN)
  
  
Job ID: 20426
  
  
Location:
  
  
ST Engineering Jurong East Bui, SG
  
  
**Description**
ST Engineering is a global technology, defence and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East and the U.S., serving customers in more than 100 countries. The Group uses technology and innovation to solve real-world problems and improve lives through its diverse portfolio of businesses across the aerospace, smart city, defence and public security segments. Headquartered in Singapore, ST Engineering ranks among the largest companies listed on the Singapore Exchange.
  
  
**Join our Cyber Team**
We are an industry leader in cybersecurity with over two decades of experience, we deliver a holistic suite of trusted cybersecurity solutions to empower cyber resilience for government and ministries, critical infrastructure, and commercial enterprises. Backed by our indigenous capabilities and deep domain expertise, we offer robust cyber-secure products and services in cryptography, cybersecurity engineering, digital authentication, SCADA protection, audit and compliance. We specialise in the design and build of security operations centres for cybersecurity professionals and provide managed security services to strengthen the cybersecurity posture of our government and enterprise customers.
  
  
The incumbent will design, build, and deploy agentic AI models, ensuring robust performance across digital twin simulations and real-world production systems.
  
  
This role calls for a hands-on Machine Learning Engineer with a deep understanding of both intelligent agent behavior and ML infrastructure, capable of bridging experimental models with production-grade AI solutions.
  
  
The incumbent will be a technically excellent and research-savvy AI Data Scientist who can push the boundaries of intelligent behavior—turning complex data and models into real-world, decision-capable AI systems.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

- Design and implement agentic AI models capable of autonomous decision-making, planning, and tool use in complex environments.
- Develop and train machine learning models tailored for both simulation-based (digital twin) testing and live production deployment.
- Translate high-level behavioral specifications into scalable, modular ML architectures that enable adaptive and interactive agents.
- Collaborate with data scientists, AI architects, and systems engineers to integrate models into broader AI pipelines and system architectures.
- Optimize models for efficiency, robustness, and real-time performance within distributed and resource-constrained environments.
- Implement continuous training, fine-tuning, and model evaluation workflows to support evolving agent behavior and dynamic environments.
- Ensure alignment of model outputs with system goals, safety constraints, and operational performance metrics.
- Contribute to MLOps pipelines, including model versioning, deployment automation, monitoring, and rollback mechanisms.

**Requirements**
**Experience**

- 5+ years of experience in machine learning engineering or applied AI, including model deployment in production environments.
- Demonstrated success in developing and deploying ML models within simulation and real-time operational contexts.

**Technical Skills**

- Proficiency in ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and tools for agentic and reinforcement learning (e.g., Ray RLlib, Stable-Baselines).
- Strong experience with model training, evaluation, and deployment across both digital twins and live systems.
- Familiarity with MLOps, CI/CD pipelines for ML, and monitoring tools for model performance and drift detection.
- Understanding of agent-based modeling, planning algorithms, and state/action representations.
- Experience with containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) for ML workloads.

**Preferred Knowledge**

- Exposure to agentic AI systems, multi-agent coordination, or intelligent automation frameworks.
- Familiarity with digital twin architectures, synthetic data generation, and simulation-to-reality transfer techniques.
- Experience integrating models into service-oriented or microservice architectures.

Work Location: Jurong East
  
  
Find out more: https://www.stengg.com/cybersecurity
  
  
ST Engineering believes in fostering a culture where team members are encouraged to overcome challenges, explore new ideas, and work together to succeed. We value individuals who are determined to push beyond the boundaries, and have a thirst for knowledge, continuous learning, and self-improvement
